samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="cnt_8">8</parameter>
        <parameter name="cnt_0">0</parameter>
        <parameter name="valid">1</parameter>
        <parameter name="invalid">0</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="cnt" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit counter for counting the number of serial inputs.</reg>
        <reg id="dout_valid" type="sequential_logic">Valid signal for the output data.</reg>
        <reg id="dout_parallel" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            <if>
                <true>
                    <then>
                        <assign statement_id="cnt" value="cnt_0"/> <!-- Reset counter when rst_n is active low -->
                        <assign statement_id="dout_valid" value="invalid"/> <!-- Reset valid signal for output data -->
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <assign statement_id="cnt" value="cnt + 1"/> <!-- Increment counter on clock edge -->
                    </else>
                </true>
            </if>
            <if condition="cnt == 8">
                <true>
                    <then>
                        <assign statement_id="dout_parallel" value="dout_parallel & {din_serial, 7'b0}"/> <!-- Shift in serial data into parallel output -->
                        <assign statement_id="dout_valid" value="valid"/> <!-- Set valid signal for output data when 8 serial inputs are received -->
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <assign statement_id="dout_parallel" value="dout_parallel"/> <!-- Maintain parallel output data when cnt is not 8 -->
                        <assign statement_id="dout_valid" value="invalid"/> <!-- Reset valid signal for output data when cnt is not 8 -->
                    </else>
                </true>
            </if>
        </sequential>
    </implementation>
</module>
